contact_faq_a1: The Indo-Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC) is a non-profit organization dedicated to strengthening economic and cultural ties between India and Japan.
contact_faq_q2: How can I become a member?
contact_faq_a2: You can apply for membership through our 'Join Us' page or by contacting our team directly through the contact form.
contact_faq_q3: What are the benefits of membership?
contact_faq_a3: Members receive exclusive access to networking events, trade delegations, market intelligence, and listing in our member directory.
contact_faq_q4: Does IJCC help Japanese companies enter the Indian market?
contact_faq_a4: Yes, we provide end-to-end support including market research, partner identification, and legal incorporation guidance.
contact_faq_q5: Does IJCC help Indian companies expand to Japan?
contact_faq_a5: Certainly. We facilitate business matchmaking, trade fairs participation, and provide advisory on Japanese business culture and regulations.
contact_faq_q6: Do you provide Japanese language training?
contact_faq_a6: We provide resources and support for JLPT preparation and can connect members with verified language training partners.
contact_faq_q7: Are there any events for non-members?
contact_faq_a7: While most events are exclusive to members, we occasionally host open webinars and cultural festivals. Check our Events page for details.
contact_faq_q8: How is the membership fee calculated?
contact_faq_a8: Membership fees depend on the category (Corporate, SME, Individual, etc.). Detailed pricing is available on our 'Pricing' page.
contact_faq_q9: How can I sponsor an IJCC event?
contact_faq_a9: Sponsorship opportunities are available for all major events. Please reach out to our branding team at info@ijcc.in.
contact_faq_q10: Can IJCC help with visa applications for Japan?
contact_faq_a10: We provide support and facilitation letters for business delegations. For individual visas, we guide members through the official consulate procedures.
contactForm_description: Fill out the form below and our team will get back to you within 24-48 hours.
contactForm_toastSuccessDescription: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will contact you shortly.
contactForm_toastErrorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again or email us directly.

membershipForm_partA_description: All fields are required unless marked optional.

membershipForm_japanInterest_jv: Finding a Japanese Joint Venture (JV) Partner
membershipForm_japanInterest_export: Exporting our Products/Services to the Japanese Market
membershipForm_otherInterest_placeholder: What are you looking for in Japan?
membershipForm_companyDescription_placeh: Provide a brief description of your company's products/services. This helps us understand your unique value proposition.
membershipForm_marketObjectives_label: 18. Specific Objectives for the Japanese Market
membershipForm_marketObjectives_placehol: e.g., 'We want to partner with a Japanese auto-component manufacturer for technical collaboration,' or 'We are seeking a distributor in Osaka for our specialty teas.'
membershipForm_declaration_label: I/We have read and understood the membership criteria and agree to abide by the rules and regulations of the India Japan Chamber of Commerce (IJCC). The information provided in this application is true and correct to the best of my knowledge.

news_description: Stay informed about the latest developments, strategic alliances, and success stories in the India-Japan corridor.
news_article_aima-mou_title: IJCC Signs MoU with AIMA — India's Premier Management Body
news_article_aima-mou_description: Empowering members with world-class management education, leadership programmes, and industry networking — backed by 75+ years of excellence.
news_article_iia-partnership_title: IJCC Signs MoU with IIA — India's Leading Apex Body for MSMEs
news_article_iia-partnership_description: Empowering IJCC members with MSME facilitation, industrial networking, export support, and government advocacy — backed by 38+ years and 13,500+ enterprises.
news_article_nihon-edutech_title: IJCC Signs MoU with Nihon Edutech
news_article_nihon-edutech_description: A strategic alliance to bring CII-certified TITP programs and Japanese language career pathways to IJCC members.
news_article_spolto-jv_title: Launch of India-Japan Sports Exchange JV
news_article_spolto-jv_description: IJCC and Spolto join forces to create the first institutionalized bilateral sports exchange program, impacting 100K+ people.
news_article_sem-events_title: SEM Events: Official Event Partner of IJCC
news_article_sem-events_description: Partnering with India's leading PCO to deliver world-class summits, exhibitions, and trade missions for our network.
events_page_subtitle: Join our upcoming seminars, trade missions, and cultural exchanges.
event_13_title: Japan Business Tour 2026: Industrial, Healthcare & Consumer Sectors
event_13_description: A comprehensive tour covering Manufacturing & Engineering, Healthcare & Medical, Consumer & Fashion, and Agriculture segments. Focus on diversifying MSMEs, consumer market entry, and healthcare infrastructure collaborations.
event_12_title: Japan Business Tour 2026: Food, Pharma, Cosmetics & Healthcare
event_12_description: Focus Areas: Food & Agriculture, Pharma & Biotech, Cosmetics & Beauty. Key Objectives: High-value exports, biotech collaborations, and R&D partnerships. Industries include Pharma Manufacturing, Regenerative Medicine, and Trade Fair Participation (COSME Osaka).
event_11_title: Japan Business Tour 2026: Advanced Manufacturing, Energy & Electronics
event_11_description: Join our business tour focusing on Automotive & Advanced Manufacturing, Energy & Decarbonisation, and Electronics & Components. Experience EV JAPAN, NEPCON Japan, and Smart Grid. Objectives: strategic EV investments, FDI attraction, and clean-tech collaborations.
event_10_description: An exclusive business tour focused on Manufacturing, Engineering & Industrial Solutions to strengthen MSME capabilities and enable technology partnerships. Focus: Design & Manufacturing, Mechanical Components, Factory Equipment, Additive Manufacturing, Smart MFG. Objectives: Tech Transfer, JV Models, MSME Growth.
event_9_title: Agri-Food Processing & Food Innovation Delegation Trip to Japan
event_9_description: A focused business delegation to Japan for agri-food processing and food innovation — covering processed food, fresh supply chains, food design, packaging & branding, and future food technology. Starting from ₹3,59,999 per person.
event_1_description: A high-level business delegation to Tokyo focusing on manufacturing and technology sectors.
event_8_description: An educational journey for students to experience Japanese culture and innovation firsthand.
event_2_description: Exploring new opportunities in the India-Japan trade corridor with industry leaders.
event_3_description: Celebrating the vibrant traditions and culture of Japan with food, music, and arts.
event_4_description: Mastering the nuances of Japanese corporate culture and 'Omotenashi' for successful partnerships.
event_5_description: A grand exhibition showcasing Japanese technology, lifestyle products, and cuisine.
event_6_description: Fostering innovation and R&D collaboration between Indian startups and Japanese tech giants.
